name: Fifth Third Bancorp
description: Fifth Third Bancorp is a diversified financial services company headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio. As one of the largest consumer banks in the Midwestern United States, it operates four main businesses: Commercial Banking, Branch Banking, Consumer Lending, and Wealth & Asset Management. The company provides a wide range of financial products and services, including checking and savings accounts, home equity loans, mortgages, business loans, and investment advisory services to retail, business, and institutional clients.
